canonical_question: How do I set up a design partner program — recruit 3-5 partners, agreement templates, expectation management?
aliases: Design partner program setup for B2B startup
How to recruit and manage design partners before product-market fit
Design partner agreement template and feedback cadence
constraints: Recruit 3-7 design partners maximum — fewer than 3 risks overfitting to edge cases, more than 10 creates unmanageable feedback overhead
Partners must have genuine urgency — if they will not commit to a 30-minute follow-up next week, they are not in enough pain
Design partner agreements must assign all feedback IP to the vendor — ambiguous IP ownership creates diligence problems during fundraising or acquisition
Do not treat design partners as revenue — optimize for raw, honest feedback over early monetization
Each partner engagement should last 6-12 weeks with a hard end date — open-ended engagements lose momentum and delay product-market fit

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User already has paying customers and needs to formalize a beta testing program
User needs to validate a startup idea before approaching partners
User needs channel/reseller partner program, not product design partners

inputs_needed.question: What is the target market segment?
How strong is the founder's professional network in the target market?
What is the user's technical skill level?
